name: Hot Chocolate Float
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the warm water in a 2-cup measure, stirring uncovered on 100% power for 1 and a half to 2 minutes until steaming hot.
2. Stir in the cocoa mix.
3. Pour into a mug.
4. Top with a small scoop of ice cream (Chocolate-chip Mint or preferred flavor).
5. Serve immediately.
